title: Chobits
sourceNotes: Single-cour 26-episode TV anime (2002), a full faithful adaptation of the complete manga (88 chapters across 8 volumes). The manga has no formally named story arcs; broad divisions below are anchored to episodes 9 and 18, which Wikipedia notes are clip/recap episodes marking natural breaks in the story. The anime softens some of the manga's more philosophical tone and adds minor original material without altering the plot.
